name: Secure the Relay
description: Raiders hold a working relay station. Take the consoles intact.

name: Survey: Address 04
description: First crewed survey of a new address.

name: Pilgrim Roads
description: Veyra's holy city awaits. Find a way into the Penitence before the Second Expedition's trail goes cold.

name: The Penitence
description: The plan is set. Get inside the basilica-prison and find the Second Expedition.

name: The First Blade
description: Seryn Vael, the Luminous One's champion, stands between you and the way out.

name: Relic Vault
description: Seize the precursor artifacts from the temple armory: arm the research, and find the god's sanctum.

name: The Luminous One
description: The vault core resonates with a sanctum in the caldera. Track it, and meet the god face to face.
